---
title: "Brendan Robert E. Ansell"
image: "IMG_5093.png"
links:
  # - label: LinkedIn
  #   url: "https://linkedin.com/"
  # - label: Twitter
  #   url: "https://twitter.com/"
  - label: GitHub
    url: "https://github.com/bansell"
  - label: Email
    url: "mailto:email@email.com"
output:
  postcards::jolla
site: distill::distill_website
---
 
I am a computational biologist using genetic data to study diseases of the brain and the retina. 
I work with a fantastic team at the [WEHI](https://www.wehi.edu.au/news/genetic-discovery-gives-insight-causes-eye-disease) in Melbourne, Australia.  
I also teach R workshops.
